validation.name: server_side_scope
validation.rule: Every school API request must apply school_id from session, not from browser-submitted value.

validation.name: certificate_generation_gate
validation.rule: Certificates generated only for published results and active/non-revoked students.

validation.name: verification_public_fields
validation.rule: Public certificate verification can expose only whitelisted fields; never expose parent contact/payment data/PDF private URL.

validation.name: courier_required_fields
validation.rule: Courier submission requires courier_company, awb_number, dispatch_date, package_count, sheets_dispatched, receipt_file.

validation.name: received_count_reconciliation
validation.rule: If sheets_received differs from sheets_expected, create exception status and require resolution notes.

validation.name: material_release_window
validation.rule: Material download allowed only after release_at and before expires_at if configured.

validation.name: payment_before_material
validation.rule: Payment paid/manually_confirmed and slot_confirmed required before material download.

validation.name: slot_capacity_check
validation.rule: Booked student count plus current school count must not exceed capacity_students; school count must not exceed capacity_schools.

validation.name: student_file_size
validation.rule: Student upload max size should be configurable, default 10 MB.

validation.name: fee_config_required
validation.rule: Olympiad fee_per_student and school_commission_per_student must exist before finalisation.

validation.name: omr_csv_schema
validation.rule: OMR import CSV must include candidate_id, raw_score, max_marks; optional answer_sheet_number and exception_status.

validation.name: locked_participation_edit
validation.rule: After count_finalised, student changes require operations/admin override and audit.

validation.name: student_count_positive
validation.rule: Final confirmed_student_count must be greater than zero.

validation.name: payment_before_slot
validation.rule: Payment status paid or manually_confirmed required before exam slot booking.

validation.name: net_amount_non_negative
validation.rule: Net amount payable must be >= 0 and gross = count * fee; commission = count * commission_per_student.

validation.name: webhook_signature
validation.rule: Razorpay webhook must verify signature before any payment status update.

validation.name: idempotency_key
validation.rule: Payment webhooks and mutating actions must use trace_id/idempotency key to avoid duplicate effects.

validation.name: omr_candidate_match
validation.rule: Every OMR candidate_id must exist in the participation and not be duplicated.

validation.name: result_publish_gate
validation.rule: Results cannot be published unless all imports approved and no unresolved exceptions exist.

validation.name: score_range_check
validation.rule: raw_score must be between 0 and max_marks.

validation.name: coordinator_email_valid
validation.rule: Coordinator email must be syntactically valid and unique for active school user mapping unless intentionally shared.

validation.name: school_duplicate_check
validation.rule: Prevent duplicate active school registration for same school name/email/domain and olympiad unless admin overrides.

validation.name: school_required_fields
validation.rule: School registration requires name, city, state, coordinator name, coordinator email, olympiad selection.

validation.name: student_consent_required
validation.rule: Students without consent_obtained=true cannot be finalised.

validation.name: student_duplicate_rule
validation.rule: Duplicate check within school+participation using candidate_id if existing, else student_name+grade+school_roll_number.

validation.name: student_file_type
validation.rule: Student upload accepts CSV/XLSX only.

validation.name: student_required_columns
validation.rule: Student upload must include student_name, grade, olympiad/subject or participation mapping, consent_obtained.

validation_on_unknown_entity.name: student_file_size
validation_on_unknown_entity.rule: Student upload max size should be configurable, default 10 MB.

validation_on_unknown_entity.name: fee_config_required
validation_on_unknown_entity.rule: Olympiad fee_per_student and school_commission_per_student must exist before finalisation.

validation_on_unknown_entity.name: payment_before_slot
validation_on_unknown_entity.rule: Payment status paid or manually_confirmed required before exam slot booking.

validation_on_unknown_entity.name: omr_csv_schema
validation_on_unknown_entity.rule: OMR import CSV must include candidate_id, raw_score, max_marks; optional answer_sheet_number and exception_status.

validation_on_unknown_entity.name: idempotency_key
validation_on_unknown_entity.rule: Payment webhooks and mutating actions must use trace_id/idempotency key to avoid duplicate effects.

validation_on_unknown_entity.name: server_side_scope
validation_on_unknown_entity.rule: Every school API request must apply school_id from session, not from browser-submitted value.
